scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=require('./package.json');const manifest=require('./manifest.json');manifest.version=pkg.version;fs.writeFileSync('manifest.json', JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)+'\n');const versions={};versions[pkg.version]=manifest.minAppVersion;fs.writeFileSync('versions.json', JSON.stringify(versions, null, 2)+'\n');"
